summary: Admin Panel testing completed successfully. All features verified working: Role Management (3 roles), Entity Configuration (5 entities), Permission Matrix (fully functional with role selection and permission editing). CRITICAL: Production URL https://1law-solicitors.com is DOWN (Cloudflare Error 1023 - Could not find host). Testing was performed on Emergent preview URL (https://onelaw-crm.preview.emergentagent.com) which is working correctly.

infrastructure_issues.error: Cloudflare Error 1023 - Could not find host
infrastructure_issues.note: This is a DNS/Cloudflare configuration issue, not a code issue

login.details: Login with admin/Admin2026 successful on Emergent preview URL

admin_panel_access.details: Admin Panel loads correctly with all tabs visible

features_verified: Role selector dropdown with all 3 roles
Permission columns: Read, Create, Edit, Delete, Assign, Export
Scope options: None, Own, Team, All
Admin role has full access (All) to all entities
Supervisor role has Team access to leads/deposits

endpoints_tested.result: Returns 5 entities: leads, deposits, teams, reports, settings
Returns permission matrix for selected role with all 5 entities

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix DNS/Cloudflare configuration for https://1law-solicitors.com - currently showing Error 1023 'Could not find host'
All Admin Panel features are working correctly - no code changes needed
critical_code_review_comments: Backend APIs are working correctly on production (https://lawfirm-ops.emergent.host)
Frontend is working correctly on Emergent preview URL
Database seeding was successful - all roles, entities, and permissions are present

seed_data_verified.permissions: All roles have appropriate permissions configured

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel is fully functional. Production frontend URL (1law-solicitors.com) has DNS issues but backend (lawfirm-ops.emergent.host) and Emergent preview URL (deposit-crm.preview.emergentagent.com) are working correctly. All seed data (3 roles, 5 entities, permissions) is present and verified.
